prestazioni: Crank the CZDA 2.0L TFSI engine to 380 HP and 500 Nm via a custom ECU flash by APR Stage 2+ (software version: APR MQB_EVO_2.0T_STG2+_V1.2) paired with a Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger (71mm compressor wheel, 0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a high-flow downpipe (APR Catted Downpipe, 3.5" diameter, 200-cell catalytic converter).

Replace the stock intercooler with a Wagner Tuning Competition Intercooler (FMIC core dimensions: 600x320x70mm, bar-and-plate design, 50% larger than OEM) and upgrade the charge pipes to 3" aluminum units from Forge Motorsport (part #FMICP09K) with silicone couplers reinforced with Kevlar (Forge Motorsport part #FMSC09).

Swap the factory 7-speed S tronic (DL382-7F) for a 034Motorsport Stage 2 DSG TCU Tune (software version: 034_DSG_STG2_2.0T_V1.4) and install a Sachs Performance Clutch Kit (dual-disc setup, part #3000 955 030) with a lightweight flywheel (034Motorsport part #034-020-0105, 8.5kg) to handle the increased torque.
estetica: Fit a full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (part #RB-Q3SB-03) with custom carbon fiber fender flares (30mm wider front, 40mm wider rear) and a ducktail spoiler (Rocket Bunny part #RB-Q3SB-03-SP) for aggressive stance and aero balance.

Install a set of OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels (19x9.5 ET35 front, 19x10.5 ET40 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (255/35/19 front, 275/30/19 rear) with a custom air suspension setup (Air Lift Performance 3P management, Slam Specialties RE-7R struts, and AccuAir E-Level sensors).

Replace the stock headlights with LUX HID Projector Assemblies (part #LUX-Q3-2021-HID, Bi-Xenon with adaptive LED DRLs) and add a custom LED taillight setup by VLand (part #VL-ATL-Q3-2021, sequential turn signals, smoked lenses) paired with a full de-chrome treatment (vinyl wrap in Avery Dennison Gloss Black Metallic).
